itinerary.title: Itinerary

As you transfer to your hotel in the heart of Hanoi, soak in your first glimpses of this dynamic capital—where the serenity of ancient temples meets the rhythm of motorbikes and street vendors. The tree-lined avenues of the French Quarter whisper tales of Indochina, while lakeside paths and traditional shopfron

itinerary.title: Hanoi Discovery – Temples, Legends & Colonial Charm
itinerary.description: Your full-day exploration begins at the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, the resting place of the revered leader. Nearby, his House on Stilts offers a modest glimpse into the lifestyle of a man who guided a nation.At the One Pillar Pagoda, dating back to 1049, you’ll see one of Vietnam’s most iconic religious sites—symbolizing purity rising from a lotus pond. The peaceful Tran Quoc Pagoda, Hanoi’s oldest Buddhist temple, stands gracefully by West Lake.After lunch, stroll through the poetic grounds of the

itinerary.title: Halong Beckons – Cruise into the Bay of Legends
itinerary.description: Leave the bustle of Hanoi behind as you journey through the Red River Delta, passing by vibrant rice fields, riverside villages, and farmers guiding their water buffalo. Arrive at Tuan Chau Harbor, where your elegant cruise vessel awaits to carry you through the magical seascape of Halong Bay and the tranquil waters of Lan Ha Bay.As your boat glides past towering limestone pillars rising from emerald waters, enjoy a freshly prepared seafood lunch served on deck. In the afternoon, paddle a kayak
activities: As your boat glides past towering limestone pillars rising from emerald waters, enjoy a freshly prepared seafood lunch served on deck
In the afternoon, paddle a kayak

itinerary.title: Morning Mist & Flight South – Halong to Hoi An ancient town
itinerary.description: Begin your morning with a gentle Tai Chi session on the cruise deck, as the first light of day bathes the bay’s majestic limestone peaks in gold. After a hearty breakfast, set out to explore one of the area’s highlights—perhaps the impressive Cave, known for its striking stalactites and dramatic stone formations, or visit a peaceful fishing village, where the rhythms of coastal life unfold amidst scenic surroundings. Each experience offers a unique window into the natural and cultural beauty of
activities: Begin your morning with a gentle Tai Chi session on the cruise deck, as the first light of day bathes the bay’s majestic limestone peaks in gold

itinerary.title: Ancient Rhythms – Village Life & Lantern Streets of Hoi An
itinerary.description: Begin your morning in the historic heart of Hoi An, a UNESCO World Heritage Site that once thrived as a bustling Southeast Asian trading port. Walk through the vibrant morning market, where colors, aromas, and voices fill the air.Next, journey to Cam Thanh Village and step into a round bamboo coracle boat. Float gently through a peaceful water coconut forest, where fishermen cast nets and life moves with the tide. Then, head to Tra Que Herb Village, where you’ll don the attire of a Vietnamese fa

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Danang - Nha Trang
itinerary.description: You'll have the morning for a leisure breakfast before we come to collect you and take you to Danang airport to catch a flight to Nha Trang. When you arrive at the airport, you will be met and transferred directly to your hotel. itinerary.title: Nha Trang Free time and Relax
itinerary.description: The Nha Trang area is home to some of Vietnam‘s best luxury beach escapes, set in hidden coves well away from the vibrant town itself. The weather here is famously good making this the perfect place to stop and relax for a few days.Aside from relaxing at your resort, you can visit hot springs and mineral mud baths, experience underwater treasures while scuba diving in some of Vietnam’s best diving spots or simply enjoy the wonderful stretches of beach.Highlight:Relaxing at the beach offers the p

itinerary.title: Free time – Fly to Ho Chi Minh city
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the hotel and be free at leisure until our driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat International Airport, be warmly greeted by your local guide holding a personalized signboard. As you transfer to your hotel in the vibrant heart of the city, catch your first impressions of Ho Chi Minh City where sleek skyscrapers rise beside French-era villas, and the hum of motorbikes weaves through a city that never sleep

itinerary.title: Tunnels & Towers – Cu Chi and the Spirit of Ho Chi Minh
itinerary.description: Begin your day with a journey to the historic Cu Chi Tunnels, an extensive underground network used by Vietnamese soldiers during the war. Walk through reconstructed chambers, see hidden entrances, and learn about the endurance and ingenuity that defined resistance.Back in Ho Chi Minh City, explore architectural and cultural landmarks: the Reunification Palace, once the seat of South Vietnam’s government; the Notre Dame Cathedral, built entirely of French-imported materials; and the charming Cen
activities: Begin your day with a journey to the historic Cu Chi Tunnels, an extensive underground network used by Vietnamese soldiers during the war
Walk through reconstructed chambers, see hidden entrances, and learn about the endurance and ingenuity that defined resistance

itinerary.title: Life Along the Water – Mekong Delta Day Trip from Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Depart bustling Ho Chi Minh City this morning and journey south to Ben Tre, the verdant gateway to the Mekong Delta, often called the “rice bowl” of Vietnam. Upon arrival, board a small wooden boat to explore the intricate web of waterways that nourish this lush region. As you cruise past coconut palms, fruit orchards, and riverside villages, life on the river unfolds with a quiet grace.Disembark at riverside workshops where age-old techniques are still practiced. Watch as bricks are shaped by h

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Flight to Phu Quoc
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the hotel and be free at leisure until your flight  to Phu Quoc. Airport transfers will be arranged.Phu Quoc's 150-kilometer coastline, with gentle waves and transparent turquoise water, makes it Vietnam's most popular destination for water sports. If you'd prefer to lounge, head to Long Beach, which spans 20 kilometers of unobstructed sunsets. Further north, dirt roads and secluded resorts keep tree-lined beaches like Ganh Dau and Bai Thom hidden from crowds.Highlight:Famous for it

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc Island Relaxation
itinerary.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at the hotel and spend your day at your own pace.Phu Quoc Island, often referred to as the "Pearl Island," boasts stunning beaches, beautiful islands, and deserted shores. Whether you seek relaxation or outdoor activities, our travel experts are at your disposal to provide recommendations and help you tailor your day to your preferences.Highlight:Relax at your own pace and discover Phu Quoc’s pristine beaches and island charm.Meals, Activities & StayPhu Quoc Breakfast
